name: Zhejiang Yuejian Intelligent Equipment Co.,Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Yuejian Intelligent Equipment Co.,Ltd. designs, develops, produces, and sells textile machinery in China. Its products include draw texturing machines, rapier looms, towel rapier looms, warp knitting machines, textile auxiliaries, and air covering machines. The company also exports its products to Vietnam, Thailand, Egypt, India, Pakistan, Nigeria, Kenya, and other countries. Zhejiang Yuejian Intelligent Equipment Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Shaoxing, China.
